prompt: A dim, atmospheric warehouse interior with wooden plank walls and a timber-beamed ceiling. Large and small wooden crates are stacked along the left side and scattered throughout the space. Several hanging industrial pendant lamps cast warm cone-shaped beams of light downward, creating distinct pools of illumination against the dark surroundings. Fine dust particles are visible floating in the light beams. The floor is bare and dark, and the far end of the warehouse recedes into shadow, creating a moody, game-like atmosphere. To the right, a narrow passage between crate stacks leads deeper into the warehouse. Ahead, a large rolling metal door at the far wall marks the warehouse exit, partially obscured by shadow. Behind the viewer, additional stacked crates and old barrels block a secondary corridor, with a faint sliver of outside light seeping through a gap in the wooden planks. First-person viewer. First-person POV at standing eye level, looking forward down the length of the warehouse between the stacked crates. No visible character body. The camera moves cautiously through the space, with the hanging lamps and crate arrangements providing spatial reference.

The floor is bare and dark, and the far end of the visible area of the warehouse recedes into shadow, creating a moody, game-like atmosphere.
